name: 巴哈姆特1-REMAKE(BAHAMUT1-REMAKE)
short_description: In this land where magic and crisis intersect, a blue-haired boy fearlessly joins the ranks of adventurers with the ambition of defeating the legendary Dragon God Bahamut. Facing countless trials and challenges of fate, he will uncover the hidden truth and embark on his own destiny journey.
detailed_description:
warn! The English version of this game uses machine translation, so the language quality is relatively poor. If you are concerned, please do not buy it.

The classic RPG game - Bahamut, now REMAKE returns.

Clear, who aims to defeat the legendary Bahamut, embarks on his own path of adventure.

Uncover the secrets of the mysterious cloaked man and stop the crisis on Sakchi Island.

1. The unique ATB-based combat system makes each battle more exciting and exciting.

2. There are six professions to choose from, each with exclusive skills, making combat styles and strategies more diverse.

3. A rich pet system allows you to choose different pets as loyal partners. These partners will provide unique support and skills during the adventure.

4. The game world has a dynamic day and night environment system, which brings different atmospheres and challenges to players' exploration. Different time periods will affect enemy behavior, mission conditions and visual effects.

5. You can challenge your luck in the casino, or go to the arena to show your strength and win generous rewards.

6. Rich and diverse side missions, coupled with a complete mission guidance function, you can easily explore every story and this land where magic and crisis intersect, a blue-haired boy fearlessly joins the ranks of adventurers with the ambition of defeating the legendary Dragon God Bahamut. Facing countless trials and challenges of fate, he will uncover the hidden truth and embark on his own destiny journey.
